## Check type ID

`kind: object`

## Purpose

Validate frontmatter metadata against a named JSON Schema from `schemas:`.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schema` | yes | — | Name of an entry in `schemas:`. |

## Example

```yaml
schemas:
  book: ./schemas/book.json
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: object
        schema: book
```
